description: Firstsales.io is a cold email deliverability tool that warms domains over 21 days, cleans lists automatically, and monitors inbox placement hourly to double reply rates.
tagline: Never let your sales pipeline run dry
overview: Firstsales.io is an email deliverability and inbox monitoring solution for cold outreach teams. It protects sending domains through a 21-day warm-up process, cleans lists automatically, and tracks inbox placement in real time, helping sales teams achieve reported outcomes including doubled reply rates and 2.5x more booked meetings within about 30 days.
what_is: Firstsales.io is a cold email deliverability tool designed to help sales teams land in the inbox rather than the spam folder. It protects sending domains with a 21-day warm-up sequence, automatically cleans email lists, and provides real-time monitoring that shows where emails are landing on an hourly basis. This combination of proactive protection and live visibility lets teams catch deliverability issues early and keep campaigns running without interruption.

The platform delivers measurable results for B2B and sales teams focused on reply rates and meeting volume. Users typically see meaningful improvement within around 30 days, with reported outcomes including doubled reply rates and 2.5x growth in booked meetings. These results come from the combined effect of a warmed domain, a clean list, and constant monitoring that removes guesswork from deliverability management.

Firstsales.io is positioned as a deliverability and monitoring layer within a sales tech stack, complementing a CRM and outreach software rather than replacing either. It is not designed for mass email marketing, complex template design, or contact management. Its scope is narrow and purposeful: keeping cold outreach emails trusted by receiving servers and reaching the inboxes they are sent to.
